arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss delivers Adam Wharton starting verdict ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: With just two days between the Fulham and Villa games, there is little time for Glasner and his squad to work together, but thanks to the win in west London on Saturday – their fourth consecutive 2-0 away victory – the atmosphere in the camp is positive. Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has hinted that midfielder Adam Wharton could start his first Premier League game since October as the Eagles prepare to face Aston Villa on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Played For Both: Palace & Aston Villa
arts.sum: It is over 100 miles which separate Selhurst Park and Villa Park, as the crow flies – and yet links between Crystal Palace and Aston Villa, historical kit colours aside, abound in football.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sent new Chelsea penalty verdict after fresh Premier League controversy
arts.sum: Marc Cucurella appeared to pull Bogarde to the floor as the Villa man tried to reach the ball, and although referee Michael Oliver didn't give a spot-kick on the pitch, VAR had a closer look and agreed with the on-field decision. Unai Emery's side came from behind to beat the Blues at Villa Park after Marco Asencio scored a second-half brace following Enzo Fernandez's ninth minute opener.

arts.ttl: 'We already showed them' - Crystal Palace boss gung-ho ahead of Aston Villa challenge - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: But referring back to a 2-1 Carabao Cup victory at Villa Park in October and a 2-2 Premier League draw a month later, Glasner added: “It's a team with huge quality, with a clear structure of play, so it's important what we want to do in and out of possession. Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has praised Aston Villa ahead of Tuesday’s 7.30pm Premier League clash at Selhurst Park - and then explained how the Eagles intended to beat the Lions.

arts.ttl: San Diego Wave sign Canada forward Leon from Villa
arts.sum: San Diego Wave sign Canada international Adriana Leon from Aston Villa for an undisclosed fee.

arts.ttl: 'This is crucial' - Aston Villa owners handed desperate plea as open letter reaches NSWE - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: There was well publicised outrage earlier in the season when Villa president of business operations Chris Heck revealed the pricing structure for the club's Champions League group games - with some tickets costing just shy of £100 in various areas of the stadium. Aston Villa supporters clubs, in conjunction with the Villa Trust, have released a joint open letter to the club pleading with the decision makers to freeze the price of season tickets ahead of the 2025/26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Aston Villa close to decision over Marcus Rashford deal?
arts.sum: Aston Villa allegedly have an idea whether they intend to activate their £40m option to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about Rashford, Asensio, injuries and Champions League dream ahead of Palace
arts.sum: It is going to be very important tomorrow to recover and focusing on this match. Every word Unai Emery said about Rashford, Asensio, injuries and Champions League dream ahead of Palace

arts.ttl: Wes Edens shows Aston Villa support after Unai Emery deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa struck a partnership with Unai Emery's Real Union in November 2023 Aston Villa co-owner Wes Edens recently took a trip to Spain to check in on the club's partner side Real Union.

arts.ttl: Asensio raising the level at Villa – and aiming higher
arts.sum: After drawing gasps of admiration for his skills shown on debut against Tottenham, a series of near misses against Ipswich and an introduction to the intensity of the Premier League against Liverpool, Marco Asensio had his big moment against Chelsea.
